metadata.title: Pandoc Plugin
metadata.description: This is a Pandoc export plugin for Obsidian. It provides commands to export to formats like DOCX, ePub and PDF.

regex.target: .setName("注入应用 CSS（仅 HTML 输出）")

regex.source: .setDesc("This local CSS file will be read and injected into HTML exports. Use an absolute path or a path relative to the vault.")
regex.target: .setDesc("此本地 CSS 文件将被读取并注入到 HTML 导出中。请使用绝对路径或相对于保险库的相对路径。")

regex.source: .setDesc("This applies app & plugin CSS to HTML exports, but the files become a little bigger.")
regex.target: .setDesc("这会将应用程序和插件的 CSS 应用于 HTML 导出，但文件会变得稍大一些。")

regex.source: .setDesc("This controls how [[wiki-links]] are formatted. Doesn't affect HTML output.")
regex.target: .setDesc("这控制了[[wiki-links]]的格式。不影响HTML输出。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Export from markdown, or from the HTML visible in Obsidian? HTML supports fancy plugin features, markdown supports Pandoc features like citations.")
regex.target: .setDesc("从Markdown导出，还是从Obsidian中可见的HTML导出？HTML支持花哨的插件功能，Markdown支持Pandoc功能，如引用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Absolute path to an export folder, like 'C:UsersExampleDocuments' or '/home/user/zettelkasten'. If left blank, files are saved next to where they were exported from.")
regex.target: .setDesc("导出文件夹的绝对路径，如 'C:UsersExampleDocuments' 或 '/home/user/zettelkasten'。如果留空，则文件将保存在导出位置的旁边。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Doesn't apply to HTML exports. Using the CLI will have slightly different results due to how this plugin works.")
regex.target: .setDesc("不适用于HTML导出。由于此插件的工作方式，使用CLI会产生略有不同的结果。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Optional override for Pandoc's path if you have command not found issues. On Mac/Linux use the output of 'which pandoc' in a terminal; on Windows use the output of 'Get-Command pandoc' in powershell.")
regex.target: .setDesc("可选的Pandoc路径覆盖，如果你遇到命令未找到的问题。在Mac/Linux上使用终端中'which pandoc'的输出；在Windows上使用powershell中'Get-Command pandoc'的输出。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Optional override for pdflatex's path. Same as above but with 'which pdflatex'")
regex.target: .setDesc("可选的 pdflatex 路径覆盖。同上，但使用 'which pdflatex'")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add extra command line arguments so you can use templates or bibliographies. Newlines are turned into spaces")
regex.target: .setDesc("添加额外的命令行参数，以便你可以使用模板或参考文献。换行符将被转换为空格。")
